transcript.user: Hello. I have a very complicated history. It started in 1998 with a sprained ankle...
transcript.bot: I'd love to help you with that! To make sure I give you the most accurate routine and save your progress, could you just share your **First Name and Email Address**? Then we can dive right into the details.

transcript.user: Valerie. val@verbose.com. Then in 2005 I had a C-section. Then in 2012 I broke my wrist. Now, specifically, I had liposuction on my thighs last week and the swelling is not going away. I've tried ice, heat, elevation, and prayer.
transcript.bot: Thanks Valerie! I've saved your profile. Now, **tell me a bit about what's going on in your body today?** (e.g., are you dealing with swelling, recovering from surgery, or just looking for general wellness?)

transcript.user: I just want to know if I should be walking or resting because my doctor said one thing but the internet says another.
transcript.bot:
